def negative_python_perf_layer_io_operations_temporary_file_for_bytes_transform():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_io_operations_temporary_file_for_bytes_transform"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: I/O operations. Flag temporary files used only for pure bytes transformations that can stream in memory."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
